headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Marriott International, Raises Price Target to $353
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Stephen Grambling   maintains Marriott International (NASDAQ:MAR) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $350 to $353.

headline: Q1 Earnings Reach 4-Year High: Tech And Travel Surge Amidst Labor Resilience
summary: This week marks the last peak week for the Q1 2026 earnings season with 2,043 companies expected to report
